title: Quorum
description: Look up @you/quorum invocation examples, branch/merge parallelism, and the parent Packaged Factory Reference definition.

overview.title: @you/quorum
overview.body: Evaluates a text request with two independent branch assessments, then synthesizes them in a merge worker.

invocationExamples.title: Invocation examples
invocationExamples.body: Pass the request as a positional argument or on stdin. Override branch and merge providers or models when the default CODEX / gpt-5 roles are not enough.

parallelism.title: Parallelism
parallelism.body: The two quorum branch workers run as independent assessments before the merge worker synthesizes them.

parentDefinition.title: Complete definition
parentDefinition.body: The generated Packaged Factory Reference keeps the unabridged factory.json for this package.

deterministicReplay.title: Deterministic replay
deterministicReplay.body: Inspect a full-mode deterministic work-graph replay for the packaged quorum recording: timeline scrubber, topology, and work progress.
